title: avena pratensis subsp. vasconica
intro: Avena pratensis subsp. vasconica, also known as the Spanish oat, is a subspecies of the wild oat plant that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avena pratensis subsp. vasconica include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting a restful night's sleep. Avena pratensis subsp. vasconica is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and may also be found in capsule or tincture form, offering a natural remedy for various health concerns.
